fuelCards.description: Get RIDO fuel card means real savings on every refuel. Available in Premium plan.

q1.question: How much does cooperation with Get RIDO cost?
q1.answer: We offer two plans: Standard (39 PLN + 8% VAT weekly) and Premium (159 PLN + 0% VAT weekly with fuel card).

q2.question: When will I receive my payout?
q2.answer: We send payouts every Monday by 12:00 PM. Funds reach your account the same day.

q3.question: Can I collect my payout in cash?
q3.answer: Yes, every Tuesday you can collect your payout in cash at our office.

q4.question: What documents are needed?
q4.answer: You need a driving license (min. 3 years), ID card, certificate of no criminal record, medical examination and driver training course.

q5.question: Does Get RIDO work outside Warsaw?
q5.answer: Yes, we work with drivers throughout Poland, including Krakow, Gdansk, Wroclaw and other cities.

footer.description: Get RIDO - Your trusted partner in transportation. Simple settlements, weekly payouts.

seo.text: Looking for a trusted partner for Uber and Bolt drivers in Poland? Get RIDO offers simple settlements, weekly payouts and 7-day support. Choose a settlement model: 39 PLN + 8% tax (promotion from 50 PLN) or 159 PLN + 0% tax (with Get RIDO fuel card). Join Get RIDO and start earning more in Warsaw, Krakow and throughout Poland.
